Copy of Copy of MVN Plans.docx.pdf: Commercial Proposal for {Enter Account Name} Quote No.: 1 Date: 29/09/2025 Prepared by: Vinod K. 📧 vinod.k@exotel.com 📅 Book a Meeting [Insert Link] 📱 +91 9901007779 Support Contacts: 📧 hello@exotel.com / insidesales@exotel.com 📞 0808 8919 888 (Sales – Option 2 on IVR) Introduction Exotel is a cloud-based customer engagement platform that enables enterprises to build secure and scalable communication ecosystems. Our solutions unify Voice, SMS, WhatsApp, Voicebots, Streaming, Enterprise Contact Center, RCS, AI-powered automation, and Truecaller on a single platform — helping businesses streamline communication and improve customer experience. We are pleased to share the following tailored commercial proposal. Pricing Plan Plan Custom Validity As per the usage Software Charges (INR) 10,499/- (Waived oﬀ) Balance provided (INR) 1500 Total Cost (INR) 50,000 +18% GST= 59,000 Agent access Unlimited Incoming call charges (Same circle/other circles) 60p per min 1 Important Terms The proposed solution will enable the client to: ● Receive domestic / International incoming calls on mobile/landline numbers. ● Intelligently route calls with API integrations. ● Access detailed call logs and call statuses. ● Record all calls. ● Conﬁgure multi-level IVR systems. ● Integrate with CRM platforms via APIs. Outgoing Calls & Virtual Numbers ● The Mobile Virtual Number won’t support outgoing calls ● For outgoing (two-leg) calls, a Virtual Landline Number can be procured at ₹ 499 per number per month. ● Outbound calls will be charged for both legs (customer and agent) based on local/STD usage. ● Exotel provides Virtual Landline Numbers (VNs) in the following circles: Delhi/NCR, Gujarat, Mumbai, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, West Bengal, Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh, and Kerala. ● VNs remain the property of Exotel, are non-transferable, and cannot be ported. If discontinued by a provider, Exotel will replace the number with an alternate VN. 2 Spam & Whitelisting ● A fresh VN is allocated during onboarding. ● If the number is ﬂagged as spam, Exotel will not be responsible, as this depends on customer usage. ● Customers are advised to purchase Truecaller and Airtel Whitelisting services to prevent spam tagging. ● A minimum 6-month commitment is required for any allocated VN. Pricing & Rental ● Rental charges (5/11 months, as applicable) cover: ○ User logins ○ Virtual Number(s) ○ Call recordings ○ Analytics ● Unlimited channels are shared across clients, with ~130% buﬀer over average usage. No separate PRI line costs are charged. Billing & Payments ● Prepaid model: Balance is deducted for usage. Minimum recharge: ₹ 500. Unused balance carries forward. ● Invoices: ○ Payment receipt issued on the date of payment. 3 ○ Tax invoices issued on the 1st of each month for usage in the previous month. ○ Software rental invoices are raised in the following month. ○ More details: Tax Invoice vs Payment Receipt . ● No extra charges for call recordings or analytics. GST & TDS ● All prices are exclusive of 18% GST. ● If GST-unregistered, a declaration on company letterhead is required: “This is to conﬁrm that we are not eligible for GST and are therefore not registered under the GST Act, 2017. We further conﬁrm that we will not claim Input Tax Credit.” ● TDS: Deductible u/s 194J @2% (as per GoI Ministry of Finance press release, 13 May 2020). Incoming Customer Numbers ● For customer-facing mobile numbers, procure a Jio/Airtel SIM from supported circles and set up call forwarding to the Exotel VN. ● Displaying Exotel’s VN directly as the customer-facing number is not recommended, since Exotel does not provide ownership. SMS Services 4 ● SMS is charged per submission. ● DLT registration is mandatory (BSNL DLT not supported). ● Additional operator DLT scrubbing charge: ₹ 0.025 per SMS (eﬀective 1 Sept 2020). ● This is for Outgoing calls: TRAI restricts calls to DND numbers. For transactional usage, the following are required: ○ Use-case documentation. ○ CRM lead screenshot (showing name, URL, number). ○ Signed/stamped company letterhead with the declaration: “[Company Name], known as [Account SID], is using Exotel to make transactional calls to its registered users only. In case of violation, [Company Name] will provide opt-in proof within 24 hours. We agree to the terms of service: Exotel TOS.” KYC Requirements Documents to be uploaded via the Exotel dashboard (formats: png, gif, jpeg, pdf): ● Company PAN card (or Owner’s PAN). ● Certiﬁcate of Incorporation / Owner’s Passport / GST / MSME / Trade license. ● Company address proof (latest post-paid bill, rental agreement). ● Passport-size photo of one Director. More details on KYC requirements . 5 Custom Integrations ● CRM/ERP integration available via API. Documentation: developer.exotel.com/api . Validity ● This commercial proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of issuance. ● Rates are subject to TRAI regulations with at least one month’s prior notice for changes. Disclaimer This document contains conﬁdential, proprietary, and unpublished material belonging exclusively to Exotel Techcom Private Limited. It is shared with the recipient in strict conﬁdence. Unauthorized disclosure, duplication, or use of this document, in whole or in part, is strictly prohibited. 6
Copy of Whatsapp Plans.docx.pdf: Commercial Proposal for {Enter Account Name} Quote No.: 1 Date: 29/09/2025 Prepared by: Vinod K. 📧 vinod.k@exotel.com 📅 Book a Meeting [Insert Link] 📱 +91 9901007779 Support Contacts: 📧 hello@exotel.com / insidesales@exotel.com 📞 0808 8919 888 (Sales – Option 2 on IVR) Introduction Exotel is a cloud-based customer engagement platform that enables enterprises to build secure and scalable communication ecosystems. Our solutions unify Voice, SMS, WhatsApp, Voicebots, Streaming, Enterprise Contact Center, RCS, AI-powered automation, and Truecaller on a single platform — helping businesses streamline communication and improve customer experience. We are pleased to share the following tailored commercial proposal. Exotel – WhatsApp Business & Communication Solutions Solution Scope ● WhatsApp Business API: Enables scalable, automated communication through templates, free-form messages, and multimedia. Can be integrated with CRM and internal systems. ● Analytics: Comprehensive tracking with detailed message and call logs, delivery statuses, and performance insights. ● Dashboard: To schedule Whatsapp campaigns 1 Pricing Plan: Components Details / Charges (INR) WhatsApp Platform Support Charges (per month) ₹ 4,000 WhatsApp Marketing category 78.46 p per message WhatsApp Utility category 11.5 p per message WhatsApp Auth category 11.5 p per message API Fees 6 p Commitment Period 6 Months Total for 6 Months ₹ 24,000 Initial Credits (Messaging Charges) ₹ 6,000 Total Cost (Before Tax) ₹ 30,000 Total Cost (Including 18% GST) Per-Message Pricing Policy Applicable Message Categories: ● Marketing Template Messages: Charged per delivered message. ● Authentication Template Messages: Charged per delivered message. ● Utility Template Messages: 2 ○ Free if sent within the active 24-hour customer service window. ○ Charged per message if sent outside the customer service window. Customer Service Window: ● A 24-hour window opens when the user initiates or replies to a conversation. ● Any utility messages sent during this window are free of charge. Example Scenarios Case 1 – User Replies After All Template Messages Are Sent Message Flow: ● 12:00 PM – Marketing template message sent ● 2:00 PM – Utility template message sent ● 8:00 PM – Utility template message sent ● 9:00 PM – User replies (after all messages) Total Charges: 3 messages (1 Marketing + 2 Utility) ✅ Both Utility messages are chargeable as they were sent outside the service window. Case 2 – User Replies Before Utility Messages Are Sent Message Flow: ● 12:00 PM – Marketing template message sent 3 ● 1:00 PM – User replies (service window opens) ● 2:00 PM – Utility template message sent ● 8:00 PM – Utility template message sent Total Charges: 1 message (Only the Marketing message) ✅ Both Utility messages are free, as they were sent within the open customer service window. Payments & Invoicing ● 100% prepaid model; usage charges (calls/SMS/messages) are automatically debited from your wallet. ● Minimum recharge: ₹ 500. ● Unused balance carries forward to the next month. ● No additional charges for accessing call recordings or analytics. Invoicing : ● Payment receipt is issued immediately upon payment. ● Monthly tax invoice is generated on the 1st of every month based on actual usage. (Example: If 2000 credits are consumed, an invoice for ₹ 2000 + GST will be issued.) ● Software rental invoices are raised in the following month. 🔗 More details: Tax Invoice vs. Payment Receipt 4 GST & TDS Requirements If GST Unregistered: Provide a declaration on company letterhead: “This is to conﬁrm that we are not eligible for GST and are therefore not registered under the GST Act, 2017. We further conﬁrm that we will not claim Input Tax Credit.” TDS Applicability: ● Deduct TDS @2% under Section 194J (if applicable). ● As per the Press Release dated 13 May 2020, Page 2, Serial No. 16, issued by the Ministry of Finance, TDS @2% under 194J applies for FTS transactions. KYC Requirements ● Upload the following via the Exotel dashboard: ○ Company PAN card ○ Certiﬁcate of Incorporation / Owner’s passport / MSME / Udyam certiﬁcate ○ Company address proof (recent post-paid bill, rental agreement, or bank statement) ○ Director’s passport-size photo ○ Accepted formats: png, gif, jpeg, pdf ○ Guidelines: KYC Documentation ● Accepted formats: PNG, GIF, JPEG, PDF 5 Virtual Number (VN) Policy ● Local landline VNs provided for Delhi/NCR, Mumbai, Maharashtra, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Chennai, Ahmedabad, Rajasthan, MP, Kerala. ● VNs remain Exotel’s property and cannot be ported (Ownership of the number can’t be transferred). ● If discontinued by the provider, Exotel will replace it with an alternate VN. ● Virtual Number Spam & Whitelisting Policy: ○ Exotel provides a new virtual number during onboarding. ○ If the number is marked as spam, Exotel will not be responsible, as spam tagging depends on customer usage and behavior. ○ Customers are advised to purchase Truecaller and Airtel Whitelisting Services to get their number whitelisted and maintain credibility. Exotel requires a minimum commitment of 6 months for any number allocated to a customer account. Commercial Validity ● This commercial proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of issuance. ● Rates are subject to TRAI regulations with at least one month’s prior notice for changes. Disclaimer This document contains conﬁdential and proprietary information of Exotel Techcom Pvt. Ltd. Unauthorized sharing, distribution, or reproduction is strictly prohibited. 6 Scenario 1: A business sent 4 utility messages, all of them were delivered, out of which 2 were in a customer service window(explained in the trailing mail) ● WhatsApp Rate charges: 2 x 0.115 (since the other 2 messages are within a customer service window) ● Platform/API fee charges: 4 x API Fee (just a representational API fee figure) Scenario 2: A business sent 4 utility messages, but only 2 were delivered to the handset, all of them outside customer service window ● WhatsApp Rate charges: 2 x 0.115 (since only 2 messages were delivered) ● Platform/API fee charges: 4 x API Fee (as messages were successfully sent via our platform) Scenario 3: A business sent 4 marketing messages, out of which 3 got delivered ● WhatsApp Rate charges: 3 x 0.7846 (since only 3 messages were delivered) ● Platform/API fee charges: 4 x API Fee (as messages were successfully sent via our platform) 7

SIP lines.docx.pdf: Commer cial Proposal for {Enter Account Name} Quote No.: 1 Date: 29/09/2025 Prepared by: Vinod K. 📧 vinod.k@exotel.com 📅 Book a Meeting [Insert Link] 📱 +91 9901007779 Support Contacts: 📧 hello@exotel.com / insidesales@exotel.com 📞 0808 8919 888 (Sales – Option 2 on IVR) Introduction Exotel is a cloud-based customer engagement platform that enables enterprises to build secure and scalable communication ecosystems. Exotel provides SIP lines that allow customers to connect their own or third-party bots (via SIP/VoIP) to the Exotel platform, enabling calls on Exotel virtual numbers to be routed directly to the bot with full call logs, recordings, and analytics, supporting both unidirectional (bot-only) and bidirectional (human + bot) streaming We are pleased to share the following tailored commercial proposal. ● Solution Scope ○ Exotel provides SIP lines that allow customers to connect their own or third-party bots (via SIP/VoIP) to the Exotel platform, enabling calls on Exotel virtual numbers to be routed directly to the bot with full call logs, recordings, and analytics, supporting both unidirectional (bot-only) and bidirectional (human + bot) streaming ○ Intelligent call routing with API integrations 2 Important Terms ● Call Charges ○ For automated calls, a single leg will be consumed. ○ For human-initiated outgoing calls (2-leg calls), charges apply separately to each leg (local/STD split). ○ Call attempts (not answered calls) are also chargeable. ● Rental Coverage ○ Rentals for 5/11 months include user logins, virtual numbers, call recordings, and analytics. ○ Agreement is valid for 1 year from start date. ○ Rates may change as per TRAI regulations with 30 days’ notice. ● Channels ○ Unlimited channels oﬀered from a shared pool with ~130% buﬀer over prior month’s usage. ○ No separate PRI line charges. ● Payments & Invoicing ○ 100% prepaid model; usage debited against balance. ○ Unused balance is carried forward. Minimum recharge: ₹ 500. 3 ○ Payment receipt issued on payment date. Tax invoices issued monthly for actual usage. ○ Rental invoices raised in the following month. ○ Details: Tax Invoice vs. Payment Receipt ● GST & TDS ○ If GST unregistered, a declaration on company letterhead is required: “This is to conﬁrm that we are not eligible for GST and are therefore not registered under the GST Act, 2017. We further conﬁrm that we will not claim Input Tax Credit.” ○ TDS: Deduction u/s 194J @2% (if applicable). ● Incoming and outgoing Numbers ○ Incoming Calls: Customers must use their own customer-facing number (Airtel or Jio SIMs are preferred). These calls can be forwarded to Exotel virtual landline numbers where available in circles such as Delhi, Gujarat, Mumbai, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, West Bengal, Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh, and Kerala. ○ Displaying Exotel virtual landline numbers as customer-facing numbers is not advisable since Exotel does not provide ownership of these numbers. ○ Outgoing Calls: Customers cannot use their own numbers for outbound calls. Outgoing calls will always display Exotel virtual landline numbers from the above circles. ● Custom Integrations ○ API documentation: developer.exotel.com/api . ○ FAQs - Voice & Phone Calls ● Commercial Validity ○ Proposal valid for 30 days from issue date. 4 ● SMS Services ○ Exotel provides SMS services; however, SMS is not supported for this particular account. Please reach out to Exotel support or your account manager for further assistance. ● KYC Requirements Upload the following via the Exotel dashboard: ○ Please note that to procure SIP lines from Exotel, the company must be registered in Karnataka, Mumbai, Delhi, West Bengal, Gujarat, or Andhra Pradesh, and KYC is mandatory even for trial accounts; after creating a trial account, visit the KYC document section, select your registered city, download the CAF form, complete, sign, and seal it, and submit it along with the Aadhaar card to your Exotel account manager for KYC approval ○ Company PAN card ○ Certiﬁcate of Incorporation / Owner’s passport / MSME / Udyog aadhar ○ Company address proof (recent post-paid bill, rental agreement, or bank statement) ○ Director’s passport-size photo ○ Accepted formats: png, gif, jpeg, pdf ○ Guidelines: KYC Documentation Virtual Number (VN) Policy ● Local landline VNs provided for Delhi, Mumbai,, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Kolkata and Ahmedabad ● Mobile DIDs available for selected states, please contact your account manager or Exotel support. ● VNs remain Exotel’s property and cannot be ported (Ownership of the number can’t be transferred). ● If discontinued by the provider, Exotel will replace it with an alternate VN. ● Virtual Number Spam & Whitelisting Policy: ○ Exotel provides a new virtual number during onboarding. ○ If the number is marked as spam, Exotel will not be responsible, as spam tagging depends on customer usage and behavior. 5 ○ Customers are advised to purchase Truecaller and Airtel Whitelisting Services to get their number whitelisted and maintain credibility. ○ Exotel requires a minimum commitment of 6 months for any number allocated to a customer account. ○ Disclaimer: This document contains conﬁdential and proprietary information of Exotel Techcom Private Limited . It is intended solely for the recipient. Any unauthorized sharing, use, or reproduction is strictly prohibited. 6

Virtual Number Spam & Whitelisting Policy: ● A new virtual number is assigned during onboarding. ● Exotel is not responsible if the number is marked as spam (depends on customer usage). ● Customers are advised to purchase Truecaller and Airtel Whitelisting Services for credibility. ● Minimum commitment: 6 months for any number allocated. 7 Disclaimer: This document contains confidential and proprietary information of Exotel Techcom Private Limited . It is intended solely for the recipient. Any unauthorized sharing, use, or reproduction is strictly prohibited. 8
Toll Free plans.docx.pdf: Commercial Proposal for {Enter Account Name} Quote No.: 1 Date: 29/09/2025 Prepared by: Vinod K. 📧 vinod.k@exotel.com 📅 Book a Meeting [Insert Link] 📱 +91 9901007779 Support Contacts: 📧 hello@exotel.com / insidesales@exotel.com 📞 0808 8919 888 (Sales – Option 2 on IVR) Introduction Exotel is a cloud-based customer engagement platform that enables enterprises to build secure and scalable communication ecosystems. Our solutions unify Voice, SMS, WhatsApp, Voicebots, Streaming, Enterprise Contact Center, RCS, AI-powered automation, and Truecaller on a single platform — helping businesses streamline communication and improve customer experience. We are pleased to share the following tailored commercial proposal. Pricing Plan Plan Custom Validity As per the usage Software Charges (INR) 10,499/- (Waived oﬀ) Number cost 1500 per num per month Total Cost (INR) 50,000 +18% GST= 59,000 Agent access Unlimited Toll-free incoming call charges (Same circle/other circles) Rs1.90 per min 1 Important Terms The proposed solution will enable the client to: ● Receive domestic incoming calls on mobile/landline numbers. ● Intelligently route calls with API integrations. ● Access detailed call logs and call statuses. ● Record all calls. ● Conﬁgure multi-level IVR systems. ● Integrate with CRM platforms via APIs. Outgoing Calls & Virtual Numbers ● For outgoing (two-leg) calls, a Virtual Landline Number can be procured at ₹ 499 per number per month. ● Outbound calls will be charged for both legs (customer and agent) based on local/STD usage. ● Exotel provides Virtual Landline Numbers (VNs) in the following circles: Delhi/NCR, Gujarat, Mumbai, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, West Bengal, Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh, and Kerala. ● VNs remain the property of Exotel, are non-transferable, and cannot be ported. If discontinued by a provider, Exotel will replace the number with an alternate VN. 2 Spam & Whitelisting ● A fresh VN is allocated during onboarding. ● If the number is ﬂagged as spam, Exotel will not be responsible, as this depends on customer usage. ● Customers are advised to purchase Truecaller and Airtel Whitelisting services to prevent spam tagging. ● A minimum 6-month commitment is required for any allocated VN. Pricing & Rental ● Rental charges (5/11 months, as applicable) cover: ○ User logins ○ Virtual Number(s) ○ Call recordings ○ Analytics ● Unlimited channels are shared across clients, with ~130% buﬀer over average usage. No separate PRI line costs are charged. Billing & Payments ● Prepaid model: Balance is deducted for usage. Minimum recharge: ₹ 500. Unused balance carries forward. ● Invoices: ○ Payment receipt issued on the date of payment. 3 ○ Tax invoices issued on the 1st of each month for usage in the previous month. ○ Software rental invoices are raised in the following month. ○ More details: Tax Invoice vs Payment Receipt . ● No extra charges for call recordings or analytics. GST & TDS ● All prices are exclusive of 18% GST. ● If GST-unregistered, a declaration on company letterhead is required: “This is to conﬁrm that we are not eligible for GST and are therefore not registered under the GST Act, 2017. We further conﬁrm that we will not claim Input Tax Credit.” ● TDS: Deductible u/s 194J @2% (as per GoI Ministry of Finance press release, 13 May 2020). Incoming Customer Numbers ● For customer-facing mobile numbers, procure a Jio/Airtel SIM from supported circles and set up call forwarding to the Exotel VN. ● Displaying Exotel’s VN directly as the customer-facing number is not recommended, since Exotel does not provide ownership. SMS Services 4 ● SMS is charged per submission. ● DLT registration is mandatory (BSNL DLT not supported). ● Additional operator DLT scrubbing charge: ₹ 0.025 per SMS (eﬀective 1 Sept 2020). ● This is for Outgoing calls: TRAI restricts calls to DND numbers. For transactional usage, the following are required: ○ Use-case documentation. ○ CRM lead screenshot (showing name, URL, number). ○ Signed/stamped company letterhead with the declaration: “[Company Name], known as [Account SID], is using Exotel to make transactional calls to its registered users only. In case of violation, [Company Name] will provide opt-in proof within 24 hours. We agree to the terms of service: Exotel TOS.” KYC Requirements Documents to be uploaded via the Exotel dashboard (formats: png, gif, jpeg, pdf): ● Company PAN card (or Owner’s PAN). ● Certiﬁcate of Incorporation / Owner’s Passport / GST / MSME / Trade license. ● Company address proof (latest post-paid bill, rental agreement). ● Passport-size photo of one Director. More details on KYC requirements . 5 Custom Integrations ● CRM/ERP integration available via API. Documentation: developer.exotel.com/api . Validity ● This commercial proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of issuance. ● Rates are subject to TRAI regulations with at least one month’s prior notice for changes. Disclaimer This document contains conﬁdential, proprietary, and unpublished material belonging exclusively to Exotel Techcom Private Limited. It is shared with the recipient in strict conﬁdence. Unauthorized disclosure, duplication, or use of this document, in whole or in part, is strictly prohibited. \ 6
Truecaller plan.docx.pdf: Commercial Proposal for Quote No.: 1 Date: 29/09/2025 Prepared by: Vinod K. 📧 vinod.k@exotel.com 📅 Book a Meeting [ Link ] 📱 +91 9901007779 Support Contacts: 📧 hello@exotel.com / insidesales@exotel.com 📞 0808 8919 888 (Sales – Option 2 on IVR) Introduction Exotel is a cloud-based customer engagement platform that enables enterprises to build secure and scalable communication ecosystems. Our solutions unify Voice, SMS, WhatsApp, Voicebots, Streaming, Enterprise Contact Center, RCS, AI-powered automation, and Truecaller on a single platform — helping businesses streamline communication and improve customer experience. We are pleased to present our Truecaller Business Solution, designed to help large enterprises enhance brand visibility, streamline customer communication, and build trust through veriﬁed caller identiﬁcation. Plan Growth Validity 6 Months Number of impressions per month 50,000/- Cost per additional impression ₹ 0.71 Total phone numbers whitelisted 250 Total Cost INR 1,77,000 Total Cost with 18% GST INR 2,08,860 1 Truecaller Veriﬁed Plan – Commercial Details 1. Call Charges When using Truecaller Veriﬁed Plans for outgoing calls, the applicable call charge is ₹ 1 per minute, applicable for both incoming and outgoing legs of the call. For any assistance or to explore Voice or add-on solutions, please contact: 📧 hello@exotel.com or reach out to your Exotel Account Manager. 2. Additional Requirements a. Brand Logo ● Format: PNG ● Dimensions: 200×200 pixels ● Maximum File Size: 5 MB ● List of numbers to be whitelisted b. SPOC Details: Provide the Name, Phone Number, and Email ID of the Single Point of Contact (SPOC) who will manage the listing process and require dashboard access. 2 3. GST & TDS Compliance If not registered under GST, please provide a declaration on your company letterhead stating: “This is to conﬁrm that we are not eligible for GST and are therefore not registered under the GST Act, 2017. We further conﬁrm that we will not claim Input Tax Credit.” TDS Deduction: Applicable under Section 194J @2% (if applicable). 4. Truecaller Commercial – Impressions Policy Deﬁnition: In Truecaller advertising, the number of impressions refers to the total number of times your veriﬁed business name or ad is displayed (seen) on users’ screens within the Truecaller app. Example: If your ad appears: ● Once when a user receives a call (Caller ID screen), and ● Once when they check their call history or SMS inbox, that equals two impressions for a single user. Where Impressions Occur: ● Caller ID Pop-up: Display of veriﬁed name and logo during incoming/outgoing calls. ● After-call Screen: Brand appears immediately after a call ends. ● Inbox / SMS / Search Ads: Visibility within the Truecaller interface. 3 Each display counts as one impression, even if the user does not click or interact with the ad. Impression Limit & Additional Charges: ● A deﬁned number of free impressions are included in the base plan. ● Once the allocated impressions are exhausted, additional impressions will be charged at the applicable Truecaller commercial rate as per the subscribed plan. 5. Commercial Validity This proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of issue. 6. KYC Requirements Please upload the following documents via the Exotel Dashboard: ● Company PAN Card ● Certiﬁcate of Incorporation / Owner’s Passport / MSME / Udyam Aadhaar ● Company Address Proof (latest post-paid bill, rental agreement, or bank statement) ● Director’s Passport-size Photo Accepted ﬁle formats: PNG, GIF, JPEG, PDF For detailed KYC documentation guidance, please visit: 🔗 Exotel KYC Guidelines 4 5

Charges: ₹ 2,000 per agent per month + 18% GST. ○ Each additional agent will be charged at the same rate. 2. Payment Terms: 6 months advance payment (prepaid deposit). 3. Billing: ○ Pro-rata billing applies only for the onboarding month. ○ From the following month (1st onwards), regular charges apply as per proposal. 4. Agreement Validity: One (1) year from the start date (Go Live Date) -- Rates may change in line with TRAI regulations with a minimum 1-month notice. 1 Pricing Details: Unique Agent Access INR 2000 per agent/month Virtual Number 1 Free Additional @ INR 499 per number/ month Credits Provided INR 2000 x 10 agents x 3 months credits = INR 60000 Total cost (INR) INR 60,000 + 18% GST = 70800 Channels Unlimited Validity As per balance (Credit consumption depends on the number of agents added / removed) Terms & Conditions – Exotel’s User-Based Calling Plan 1. Pricing & Billing ● ₹ 2000 + 18% GST per agent/month (deducted as 2000credits). ● 1 credit = ₹ 1. ● Billing cycle: Monthly, from the 1st. Ensure the wallet is topped up by the 29th. ● Pro-rata billing applicable only in the ﬁrst month. 2 2. Agent Management ● Charges apply to all created agent proﬁles (veriﬁed/unveriﬁed, active/inactive). ● Adding an agent deducts ₹ 2000 ● Updating an agent’s details (i.e. changing the registered phone number) will not be treated as deleting and re-adding the agent. No credits will be deducted from your wallet for such modiﬁcations. ● However, deleting an agent proﬁle and adding a new one mid-month will deduct the full monthly rental as credits again. To avoid unnecessary charges, it is recommended to perform deletions at the end of the month and add new agents at the beginning of the month. ● Recommendation: Delete unused agents before month-end to avoid extra billing. 3. Agent Creation Policy ● All agents must be added under Coworkers and Groups on the Exotel dashboard. ● Exotel may auto-create agent proﬁles from outgoing call logs if API calls are made without corresponding agent proﬁles on the dashboard. ● Outgoing API calls without dashboard proﬁles are not permitted. 4. Calls Included vs. Excluded Included: ● Local calls within India via Exotel VNs. ● Dashboard-originated calls, CRM-based C2C API calls, inbound routed calls (no programmable connect via URL). 3 Excluded (charged separately): ● Campaign/bulk calls via dashboard or API. ● Non-agent initiated veriﬁcation calls. 5. Fair Usage Policy ● Violations may move account to minute-based billing. ● Exotel will notify and attempt resolution before imposing additional charges. 6. Plan Flexibility ● No ﬁxed validity. ● Credit consumption depends on the number of agents added/removed. 7. Virtual Number (VN) Policy ● Local landline VNs provided for Delhi/NCR, Mumbai, Maharashtra, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Chennai, Ahmedabad, Rajasthan, MP, Kerala. ● VNs remain Exotel’s property and cannot be ported (Ownership of the number can’t be transferred). ● If discontinued by the provider, Exotel will replace it with an alternate VN. ● Virtual Number Spam & Whitelisting Policy: ○ Exotel provides a new virtual number during onboarding. ○ If the number is marked as spam, Exotel will not be responsible, as spam tagging depends on customer usage and behavior. ○ Customers are advised to purchase Truecaller and Airtel Whitelisting Services to get their number whitelisted and maintain credibility. ○ Exotel requires a minimum commitment of 6 months for any number allocated to a customer account. 4 8. Payment Terms ● 100% prepaid wallet-based model. ● Minimum top-up: ₹ 500. ● Unused credits carry forward. ● Call recordings available for 6 months. 9. Taxes & TDS ● All prices exclusive of 18% GST. ● TDS (if applicable): 2% u/s 194J. 10. Integrations ● CRM/ERP integrations via Exotel API . 11. Oﬀer Validity ● Proposal valid for 30 days from date of issuance. Payments & Invoicing ● Payment receipt on the day of payment. ● Tax invoice issued monthly based on credits consumed. 5 ● Rental invoice raised in the following month. ● More details: Tax Invoice vs Payment Receipt GST & TDS ● If GST unregistered, declaration required: “This is to conﬁrm that we are not eligible for GST and are therefore not registered under the GST Act, 2017. We further conﬁrm that we will not claim Input Tax Credit.” ● TDS deductible @2% under Section 194J (if applicable). Incoming & Outgoing Numbers ● Incoming: Customers must use their own number (Airtel/Jio preferred), which can be forwarded to Exotel VNs in supported circles. ● Outgoing: Customer numbers cannot be used. Outgoing calls will always display Exotel VNs. SMS Services ● SMS charged on submission; DLT registration mandatory. ● BSNL DLT not supported. ● Operator DLT scrubbing charge: ₹ 0.025/SMS. 6 ● Calls/SMS to DND numbers restricted by TRAI. ● Transactional usage requires: ○ Use case documentation ○ CRM lead screenshot (name, URL, number) ○ Signed/stamped declaration: “[Company Name], known as [Account SID], is using Exotel to make transactional calls to its registered users only. In case of any violation, [Company Name] will provide opt-in proof within 24 hours. We agree to the terms of service: Exotel TOS .” KYC Requirements Upload via Exotel dashboard: ● PAN card (Company/Owner) ● Certiﬁcate of Incorporation / Passport copy of owner ● Address proof (recent post-paid bill, rental agreement, or bank statement) ● Director’s passport-size photo ● Accepted formats: png, gif, jpeg, pdf More details: KYC Documentation 7 Disclaimer This document contains conﬁdential, proprietary information of Exotel Techcom Pvt. Ltd. Unauthorized disclosure, use, or reproduction is strictly prohibited. 8

We are delighted to oﬀer you our Voice Streaming solutions, designed to help large businesses improve eﬃciency and reliability in their voice communication. Technical Capabilities: ● Exotel Voice Streaming enables real-time audio streaming during live calls, empowering instant AI-driven analysis and responses. ● Supports both unidirectional (listen-only) and bidirectional (two-way) streaming, oﬀering ﬂexibility for diverse use cases such as voice analytics, IVR automation, or AI-driven engagement. ● Built on Exotel’s enterprise-grade infrastructure, ensuring high scalability, reliability, and data security for mission-critical operations. 1 Pricing Plan Plan Custom Validity 13 months Software Rental Waived oﬀ Total Cost (INR) = (Total credit balance + CPM platform rental) 20,000 + 18% GST = 23,600/- Total Available credit balance (INR) for calls and additional Virtual numbers INR 5,000 CPM platform Rental: INR 1000 per CPM/Month. Important Terms Key capabilities include: ● Intelligent call routing with API integrations ● Detailed call logs and statuses ● Call recording and analytics ● Multi-level IVR systems ● CRM/ERP integration APIs 3 Call Charges ● For automated calls, a single leg will be consumed. ● For human-initiated outgoing calls (2-leg calls), charges apply separately to each leg (local/STD split). ● Call attempts (not answered calls) are also chargeable. Rental Coverage ● Rentals for 5/11 months include user logins, virtual numbers, call recordings, and analytics. ● Agreement validity: 1 year from the start date. ● Rates are subject to TRAI regulations, with a 30-day prior notice for any change.
